heroHeadline:
Iranian Drone Hits Dubai Airport; IDF F-35I Shoots Down Iranian Jet —
First Stealth vs. Manned Air Kill in History
heroSubtitle: Day 18: Iranian drone strikes fuel tank at Dubai International Airport — Emirates suspends all flights. Missile kills Palestinian civilian in Abu Dhabi; Kuwait US Embassy struck (Rubio orders closure). IDF F-35I 'Adir' shoots down Iranian Yak-130 fighter jet over Tehran — historic first. Saudi Arabia intercepts 37 drones in eastern region. Abu Ali al-Askari (Kata'ib Hezbollah security chief) killed announced. EU votes against expanding naval ops. Turkey FM Fidan leads ceasefire push. Trump: 'Unclear if Mojtaba Khamenei is alive or not.'
footerNote: Data compiled from 100+ sources across 4 media poles as of March 17, 2026. All contested claims are marked. Multi-pole sourcing active.
